restaurants.restaurantDesc: A local favorite for authentic, high-quality Mongolian and Chinese cuisine. Known for its fresh ingredients and affordable daily specials, it offers everything from classic stir-fry to traditional Szechuan-style hot pots.

A downtown Ames staple famous for its customizable crusts, ranging from classic thin white to their signature rolled-edge Denver-style whole wheat. Don't miss their honey-dipped crust tradition or the fan-favorite Taco Pizza.

An Iowa landmark since 1970, serving massive portions of hickory-smoked BBQ in a nostalgic, family-friendly atmosphere. Famous for its expansive meat selection and an old-fashioned ice cream parlor featuring over 50 sundae varieties.

A premier downtown destination for upscale casual dining. Specializing in slow-roasted prime rib and tri-tip, it combines a sophisticated, dimly-lit ambiance with legendary desserts like their chocolate toffee bread pudding.
A popular neighborhood spot on the north side of Ames known for scratch-made breakfasts, seasonal Midwestern comfort food, and a bakery case full of rotating pastries.
A modern BBQ joint in north Ames serving smoked brisket, ribs, and creative Southern sides in a lively, rustic-industrial setting with a full bar.
A cozy Brazilian-inspired cafe and bar in Campustown offering burgers, Brazilian bar food, and craft cocktails with frequent live music and a laid-back vibe.
An Irish pub-style restaurant featuring hearty classics like shepherd’s pie and fish and chips, a large beer selection, and dark-wood, cozy interiors.
A chef-driven eatery and bakery in Somerset offering elevated American dishes, house-made breads, and an open, airy dining room with an attached market.
A British-style pub serving fish and chips, curries, and UK-inspired comfort food along with a strong draft list and soccer on TV.
A long-running Mexican restaurant offering a wide menu of combo plates, fajitas, and margaritas in a casual, family-friendly dining room.
A Cyclone-themed sports bar and grill featuring burgers, sandwiches, and pub classics, plus a popular rooftop patio packed on game days.
